title: Cheesy Mexican Stir Fry
description: A quick and easy stir fry filled with the flavors of Mexico, topped with melted cheese.

ingredients.name: beans
ingredients.amount: 1 can, black beans, drained and rinsed

instructions: 1. Heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
2. Add the sliced onion and bell pepper and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the diced tomato and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
4. Add the black beans, taco seasoning, and stir to combine.
5. Reduce heat to low and cook for 2-3 minutes.
6. Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
7. Assemble the stir fry by placing a portion of the vegetable mixture onto a tortilla and topping with shredded cheese.
8. Fold the tortilla in half to enclose the filling and cook for an additional 30-60 seconds, until the cheese is melted.
